reply_original: I am sorry to hear you feel this way. We want to make Fantasia better for you. Could you please tell us what specifically you didn't like? Please share your feedback or any issues with us at support@fantachat.ai so we can improve your experience. We hope to win you back!
reply_zh: 很抱歉听到您有这样的感受。我们希望为您打造更好的 Fantasia。您能告诉我们具体有哪些让您不满意的地方吗？请通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享您的反馈或遇到的任何问题，以便我们改进您的体验。我们希望能重新赢得您的青睐！
